coverage_note: The bundled APOB population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from APOB LDL particle structure, apoB-LDLR binding, triglyceride-rich lipoprotein metabolism, and familial hypercholesterolemia biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000084674: APOB coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: APOB findings should be read against LDL particle structure, apoB-LDLR binding, triglyceride-rich lipoprotein metabolism, and familial hypercholesterolemia biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

rs693 (APOB lipid association marker) is curated as a APOB marker for Familial hypercholesterolemia review context, LDL cholesterol and atherosclerosis biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

APOB familial-hypercholesterolemia model is curated as a APOB marker for Familial hypercholesterolemia review context, LDL cholesterol and atherosclerosis biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
